gaps: No existing test case covers the scenario of placing one earbud in the charging case and verifying the connection/disconnection behavior of both earbuds. This is a fundamental TWS earbud state transition that is completely untested.

Missing lifecycle/state transition test: What happens to the remaining earbud's connection when one earbud is inserted into the case? The bug states both disconnect — this should be tested as a state transition (in-ear -> case insertion) for each earbud independently.

Missing device-specific validation: This behavior may differ between Voyager Free 60+ UC (which has a touchscreen case and more complex state management) and Voyager Free 20 (simpler case). No test covers either device for this specific scenario.

Missing app UI state verification: No test verifies how the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen or Device Settings screen updates the connection status icons/indicators when one earbud is placed in the case (e.g., does it show one earbud as disconnected/case-charging while the other remains connected?).

Missing audio continuity test: No test verifies whether audio continues playing through the remaining earbud when one is inserted into the case, or if audio stops entirely (which would be the consequence of both earbuds disconnecting).
Missing reconnection test: No test covers what happens when the earbud is removed from the case again — does it automatically reconnect? Does the app update the UI correctly on reconnection?

generated_testcases.title: TC-TWS-SINGLE-EARBUD-INSERT-001: Voyager Free 60+ UC — Single earbud insertion causes both to disconnect (connection state verification)
steps: 1. Ensure both earbuds (Voyager Free 60+ UC) are fully charged and connected to the phone via Bluetooth.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify Home screen shows both earbuds as connected (green indicators for Left and Right).
3. Play audio (music or test tone) on the phone.
4. Verify audio is playing through both earbuds.
5. Take the LEFT earbud and place it into the charging case.
6. Observe the connection behavior on the phone's Bluetooth status bar.
7. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → observe the Home screen connection status indicators for Left and Right earbuds.
8. Check if audio is still playing through the RIGHT earbud.
9. Remove the LEFT earbud from the charging case.
10. Observe whether the LEFT earbud automatically reconnects.
11. Check Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen for updated connection status.
generated_testcases.expected: When one earbud is placed in the charging case, only that earbud should disconnect. The remaining earbud should stay connected and continue playing audio. The Poly Studio Mobile app should show the inserted earbud as disconnected/charging and the other earbud as still connected. When removed from the case, the earbud should automatically reconnect and the app UI should update accordingly.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TWS-SINGLE-EARBUD-INSERT-002: Voyager Free 60+ UC — Single earbud insertion causes both to disconnect (RIGHT earbud test, asymmetry check)
steps: 1. Ensure both earbuds (Voyager Free 60+ UC) are fully charged and connected.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify both earbuds connected on Home screen.
3. Play audio (music or test tone).
4. Verify audio playing through both earbuds.
5. Take the RIGHT earbud and place it into the charging case.
6. Observe Bluetooth connection status on phone.
7. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → check Home screen connection indicators for Left and Right.
8. Check if audio continues playing through the LEFT earbud.
9. Remove the RIGHT earbud from the charging case.
10. Verify automatic reconnection of RIGHT earbud.
11. Verify Poly Studio Mobile app shows both earbuds connected again.
generated_testcases.expected: Inserting only the RIGHT earbud should disconnect only the RIGHT earbud. The LEFT earbud should remain connected and continue playing audio. The app should show RIGHT as disconnected/charging and LEFT as connected. On removal, RIGHT should auto-reconnect and app should reflect both connected. Behavior should be symmetric with LEFT earbud insertion test.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TWS-SINGLE-EARBUD-INSERT-003: Voyager Free 20 — Single earbud insertion causes both to disconnect (connection state verification)
steps: 1. Ensure both earbuds (Voyager Free 20) are fully charged and connected to the phone via Bluetooth.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify Home screen shows both earbuds as connected.
3. Play audio (music or test tone) on the phone.
4. Verify audio is playing through both earbuds.
5. Take the LEFT earbud and place it into the charging case.
6. Observe the connection behavior on the phone's Bluetooth status bar.
7. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → observe the Home screen connection status indicators for Left and Right earbuds.
8. Check if audio is still playing through the RIGHT earbud.
9. Remove the LEFT earbud from the charging case.
10. Observe whether the LEFT earbud automatically reconnects.
11. Check Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen for updated connection status.
generated_testcases.expected: For Voyager Free 20, inserting one earbud into the case should disconnect only that earbud. The remaining earbud should stay connected and continue playing audio. The app should show the inserted earbud as disconnected/charging. On removal, the earbud should auto-reconnect. Note: If the bug (both disconnect) is present, document that both earbuds disconnect and audio stops entirely.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TWS-SINGLE-EARBUD-INSERT-004: Voyager Free 60+ UC — App UI state verification during single earbud insertion
steps: 1. Connect both Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds and open Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate: Home screen → tap [Device Name] → verify Device Settings screen shows both earbuds with connected status.
3. Place LEFT earbud into charging case.
4. Navigate back to Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen.
5. Observe the connection status icons/indicators for Left and Right earbuds.
6. Tap [Device Name] → navigate to Device Settings screen.
7. Observe the earbud status indicators on the Device Settings screen.
8. Check the battery level display for the LEFT earbud (should show charging indicator).
9. Check the battery level display for the RIGHT earbud (should show normal battery level).
10. Remove LEFT earbud from case and wait 5 seconds.
11. Verify both earbuds show as connected on Home screen and Device Settings screen.
generated_testcases.expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app should correctly reflect the state: Home screen should show LEFT earbud as disconnected (grayed out or with charging icon) and RIGHT earbud as connected (green). Device Settings screen should show LEFT earbud status as 'In Case/Charging' and RIGHT as 'Connected'. Battery indicators should update accordingly. After removal, both should show as connected.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TWS-SINGLE-EARBUD-INSERT-005: Audio continuity test — Audio continues through remaining earbud when one is inserted into case
steps: 1. Connect both Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds to phone.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → confirm both earbuds connected.
3. Start playing a continuous audio track (music or podcast) on the phone.
4. Verify audio is audible in both earbuds.
5. While audio is playing, insert the LEFT earbud into the charging case.
6. Immediately listen to the RIGHT earbud for audio continuity.
7. Note whether audio continues, stops, or pauses in the RIGHT earbud.
8. Check phone media player — is the track still playing or paused?
9. Remove LEFT earbud from case.
10. Verify audio resumes in both earbuds (if it stopped) or continues normally.
11. Repeat steps 3-10 inserting the RIGHT earbud instead.
generated_testcases.expected: Audio should continue playing through the remaining earbud (the one not inserted into the case) without interruption. The media player on the phone should continue playing. When the inserted earbud is removed from the case, audio should resume in both earbuds. If audio stops entirely when one earbud is inserted, this confirms the bug (both earbuds disconnected).

generated_testcases.title: TC-TWS-SINGLE-EARBUD-INSERT-006: Reconnection test — Earbud auto-reconnects after removal from charging case
steps: 1. Connect both Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds to phone.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify both connected on Home screen.
3. Place LEFT earbud into charging case.
4. Wait 10 seconds.
5. Verify LEFT earbud is disconnected (app shows disconnected, no audio in LEFT).
6. Remove LEFT earbud from charging case.
7. Start a timer and observe how long it takes for the LEFT earbud to reconnect.
8. Check phone Bluetooth settings — verify LEFT earbud appears as connected.
9. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify Home screen shows both earbuds connected.
10. Play audio and verify audio is present in both earbuds.
11. Repeat steps 3-10 for the RIGHT earbud.
generated_testcases.expected: The earbud should automatically reconnect within 5-10 seconds of being removed from the charging case. The Poly Studio Mobile app should update to show both earbuds as connected. Audio should resume in both earbuds. If the earbud does not auto-reconnect, this is a separate bug to document.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TWS-SINGLE-EARBUD-INSERT-007: Voyager Free 60+ UC — Touchscreen case interaction during single earbud insertion
steps: 1. Connect both Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds to phone.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify both connected.
3. Place LEFT earbud into the charging case.
4. Observe the touchscreen display on the charging case.
5. Note what the touchscreen shows for LEFT earbud status (charging icon, battery level).
6. Note what the touchscreen shows for RIGHT earbud status (connected, battery level).
7. Remove LEFT earbud from case.
8. Observe touchscreen display updates.
9. Place RIGHT earbud into the charging case.
10. Observe touchscreen display for RIGHT (charging) and LEFT (connected) status.
11. Remove RIGHT earbud and verify touchscreen returns to showing both connected.
generated_testcases.expected: The Voyager Free 60+ UC touchscreen case should correctly reflect the state: when LEFT earbud is inserted, the touchscreen should show LEFT as charging (with charging icon) and RIGHT as still connected. When removed, both should show as connected. The touchscreen should not show both earbuds as disconnected when only one is inserted.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TWS-SINGLE-EARBUD-INSERT-008: Call behavior during single earbud insertion
steps: 1. Connect both Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds to phone.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify both connected.
3. Initiate a phone call (or receive an incoming call) and answer using the earbuds.
4. Verify audio is working in both earbuds during the call.
5. During the active call, insert the LEFT earbud into the charging case.
6. Observe call audio behavior in the RIGHT earbud.
7. Check if the call continues or drops.
8. Check Poly Studio Mobile app for connection status during the call.
9. Remove LEFT earbud from case during the call.
10. Verify LEFT earbud reconnects and audio returns to both earbuds.
11. End the call and verify normal audio playback resumes in both earbuds.
generated_testcases.expected: During an active call, inserting one earbud into the case should not drop the call. The remaining earbud should continue to carry the call audio. The Poly Studio Mobile app should show the inserted earbud as disconnected and the other as connected. When removed, the earbud should reconnect and both should carry call audio. If the call drops or audio stops entirely, this confirms the bug.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TWS-SINGLE-EARBUD-INSERT-009: Voyager Free 20 — App UI state and audio continuity during single earbud insertion
steps: 1. Connect both Voyager Free 20 earbuds to phone.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify both earbuds connected on Home screen.
3. Start playing audio (music track).
4. Verify audio in both earbuds.
5. Place RIGHT earbud into charging case.
6. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → observe Home screen connection indicators.
7. Tap [Device Name] → navigate to Device Settings screen.
8. Observe earbud status and battery indicators for both earbuds.
9. Check if audio continues through LEFT earbud.

11. Verify app UI updates to show both connected and audio resumes in both.
generated_testcases.expected: For Voyager Free 20, inserting the RIGHT earbud should disconnect only the RIGHT earbud. The LEFT earbud should remain connected and continue playing audio. The Poly Studio Mobile app should show RIGHT as disconnected/charging and LEFT as connected. On removal, RIGHT should auto-reconnect and app should update accordingly.

generated_testcases.title: TC-TWS-SINGLE-EARBUD-INSERT-010: Rapid insertion/removal cycle of single earbud
steps: 1. Connect both Voyager Free 60+ UC earbuds to phone.
2. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify both connected.
3. Play audio continuously.
4. Insert LEFT earbud into charging case and immediately remove it (within 1 second).
5. Observe connection behavior — does LEFT earbud reconnect quickly?
6. Check Poly Studio Mobile app for connection status.
7. Verify audio continuity in both earbuds.
8. Repeat rapid insertion/removal 5 times in succession.
9. After the 5th cycle, wait 5 seconds and verify both earbuds are connected.
10. Open Poly Studio Mobile app → verify both earbuds show as connected.
11. Play audio and verify audio in both earbuds.
generated_testcases.expected: Rapid insertion and removal of a single earbud should not cause the other earbud to disconnect. After each cycle, the earbud should reconnect. After multiple rapid cycles, both earbuds should remain connected and audio should play through both. The app should correctly reflect the connection state after each cycle. No crashes or UI freezes should occur.
